name: Noodle Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the broad noodles.
2. In a large bowl, combine the beaten eggs, milk, sour cream, cottage cheese, sugar, raisins, and vanilla.
3. Mix in the cooked and drained noodles.
4. Grease a baking pan well.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking pan.
6. Dot the top with margarine or butter.
7. Sprinkle with a sugar and cinnamon mixture.
8. Refrigerate overnight before baking.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour, covered.
10. Remove the cover and bake uncovered until brown, about 30 to 45 minutes more.
11. Serve warm, either as an accompaniment to meat instead of potatoes or as a dessert with coffee.
